# komodo_stack_pull (Action)

Triggers a `docker compose pull` on the target Komodo stack.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the stack to pull images for.

### Optional

- `services` (List of String) Filter to only pull images for specific services. If empty, pulls for all services.
